rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 253, 231), rgb(24, 22, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(251, 192, 45), rgb(120, 69, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 336px; height: 1px; padding-top: 170px; margin-left: 14px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #5D4037;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#5D4037, #c6ada5); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
Flujo client-a → Internet
1. EC2 client-a → TGW (rt VPC)
2. TGW client-rt: 0.0.0.0/0 → inspection
3. inspection (firewall) → TGW
4. TGW inspection-rt: 0.0.0.0/0 → egress
5. egress: NAT GW (misma AZ) → IGW → Internet
6. Retorno: IGW → NAT → TGW (egress-rt) → inspection → TGW (inspection-rt) → client-a

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 147px; margin-left: 1132px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #AD1457;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#AD1457, #ff9bd5); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
TGW Flow Logs
CloudWatch
captura todo (ACCEPT + drops blackhole)
max_aggregation_interval = 60s

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 805px; margin-left: 121px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #555555;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.font:
Patrón: los clients NO tienen rutas entre sí en client-rt — todo el tráfico inter-VPC y a Internet pasa obligatoriamente por inspection-vpc. Egress-vpc concentra IGW + NAT × 2 AZ. RAM comparte el TGW con cuentas externas (allow_external_principals=true para este lab). Appliance Mode obliga a que un mismo flujo TCP siempre pase por la misma AZ del firewall.
⚠️ Coste alto: 4 attachments × $0.05/h ≈ $144/mes + 2 NAT GW ≈ $65/mes + EIPs + CloudWatch. Destruir tras la práctica.
